idea: Teach plan_and_implement to honor bead scope, non-goals, and milestone context. Add scope-aware guidance to the plan_and_implement stage so it respects bead boundaries from the prompt contract (Must-Do Scope, Explicit Non-Goals, Already Planned Elsewhere sections). When generating plans, out-of-scope work should be noted as deferred rather than added to the plan. Backward compatible with non-milestone mode.
